coach_notes: To build a strong arts-media career, focus on developing graphic design, Adobe Creative Suite, and typography, as these are core to the field. Start by taking free online tutorials on platforms like YouTube or Coursera for Photoshop and Illustrator, then practice by creating personal projects or volunteering for small design tasks. Your bilingual ability and extracurricular experience are valuable assets—combine them with these new skills to stand out in creative roles.
